message:
merge: integrate remote refactoring with local correctness fixes

Merge origin/main (fe34e175: refactor low-value trait tests into
behavioral assertions) with local commits containing channel, sync,
runtime, transport, and other correctness fixes.

Conflict resolution:
- oneshot.rs: Keep mut rx binding (required by &mut self recv API) and
  inner Arc clone (needed for waker assertion test)
- pool.rs: Keep local version with FIFO fairness, acquire timeout,
  WaiterCleanup struct, and proper drop(state) before wake -- these
  are substantive correctness fixes that supersede the remote's
  test-only refactoring of this file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
